## Checklist

- [ ] Lint passes (`eslint` / `ruff`)
- [ ] Types pass (`tsc --noEmit` / `mypy`)
- [ ] Tests pass (`vitest run` / `pytest`)
- [ ] L9 analysis (semgrep) green or covered by a waiver
